story-context.title: JWT Format and Signature Validation (Layers 1-2)
story-context.summary: Implement JWT Format validation (3-part structure) and RS256 signature validation using Keycloak JWKS public keys.
story-context.key-code: - JwtValidationFilter.kt Lines 228-231: Token extraction from Authorization Bearer header - Lines 304-309: validateFormat() - require 3 parts (header.payload.signature) - Layer 2: RS256 signature validation via Spring Security JwtDecoder - Reject HS256 (algorithm confusion prevention)
story-context.testing: Unit tests with Nullable Pattern for validation logic, Integration test with real Keycloak tokens
